overall_assessment: No release-blocking performance findings were identified in the bounded package. The external-contact branch reuses the existing contact import path, chunks backend import payloads, uses set-based matching for local exclusion, and does not introduce page-walking, N+1 backend lookup behavior, unbounded server scans, or load-amplifying cache/hydration behavior.
recommended_path: Proceed for the performance lane. Keep the deferred Wave 2D native contact/share smoke as planned, but no concrete severe runtime or server-load blocker is present in this package.
